# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentence description of what this PR does and why. -->

## Type
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore / infra
- [ ] Security

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] i18n keys added if user-facing
- [ ] Migration written if schema change
- [ ] Bible (`KIX_GAMIFICATION_BIBLE.md`) updated if architectural change
- [ ] Performance impact assessed (load tests run if hot path touched)
- [ ] Security review for sensitive endpoints (auth / payments / PII)
- [ ] Documentation updated (`docs/` or root `*.md`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII committed

## Risk
<!-- low / medium / high — explain. -->

## Rollout
<!-- staging only, prod canary, full prod, feature-flagged, etc. -->

## Screenshots / Evidence
<!-- screenshots, logs, or test output, if applicable -->

## Linked Issues
<!-- Closes #123, Refs #456 -->
